title: How Anthropic Employees ACTUALLY Use Claude Code to Grow
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes four strategies Anthropic's Growth Team uses with Claude Code, claiming they achieved 1 billion to 19 billion growth in 14 months. The strategies cover automating workflows, enabling sub-threshold work, building custom tools, and using AI as a thought partner.
